headline: 暑期档预热：福尔摩斯小姐3领跑本周趋势
headlineEn: Summer Preview: Enola Holmes 3 Leads Weekly Trends
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续霸榜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《穿普拉达的女王2》成为本周热门，多部大片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' dominates the charts, while 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' are weekly hits, with several blockbusters on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 《无职转生》异世界动画热度不减
《末日地堡》科幻剧集讨论度上升
《玩具总动员5》与《龙族》续集持续吸引关注
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' and 'House of the Dragon' sequels keep drawing attention

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》与《蜘蛛侠》新作即将上映
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and new 'Spider-Man' films coming soon
